theory.canonical_statement: ID 435 defines the real time power flow through the torus surface via the stress energy tensor T nu. For centimeter scale devices, the maximum power output is estimated in the microwatt to milliwatt range, scaling inversely with the square of the dimension a. The Poynting vector represents the flux of extracted energy directed into the storage manifold. Flux Density: Energy is concentrated via magnetic field interactions at the superconducting boundaries. Scaling Laws: Parallel arrays are utilized to increase total power output beyond single unit limits.

existing_from_tex.description: Trawinistic Green function; the two-point propagator from source point $x'$ to response point $x$.

point-source delta term that anchors the Green-function response.
TZP potential or suppression kernel between source and response points.
source point paired with the response point $x$.
